meaning: n.鍟嗕笟,涔板崠,浜ゆ槗,鐢熸剰,浜嬫儏,浜嬬墿,钀ヤ笟,鍟嗚
examples: On their lips, it's all principles; in their hearts, it's all business.
The administrators said they hope to sell most of the business as a going concern.
The mobile telephone business is making nice money for Western firms but also for indigenous hustlers.
